ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the character's role or background */,
  "faction" TEXT /* Faction the character belongs to (e.g., Rebel, Empire) */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score based on player usage and feedback */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the character belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the character was released */,
  "rarity_level" TEXT /* Rarity level of the character (e.g., common, rare, epic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stat entry */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character this stat belongs to */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health points of the character */,
  "damage" INTEGER /* Damage output of the character */,
  "defense" INTEGER /* Defense rating of the character */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Speed rating of the character */,
  "attack_speed" REAL /* Attack speed of the character */,
  "critical_hit_chance" REAL /* Critical hit chance of the character */,
  "evasion_rate" REAL /* Evasion rate of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stats_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_game_modes" (
  "character_game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the character-game mode relationship */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "performance_score" INTEGER /* Performance score of the character in the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_game_modes_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_game_modes_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "abilities" (
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the ability */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character this ability belongs to */,
  "ability_name" TEXT /* Name of the ability */,
  "ability_description" TEXT /* Description of the ability's effect */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Specific effect or mechanics of the ability (e.g., buffs, debuffs) */,
  "cooldown_duration" INTEGER /* Cooldown duration of the ability */,
  "range" INTEGER /* Range of the ability */,
  "resource_cost" INTEGER /* Resource cost of the ability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_abilities_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ability_types" (
  "ability_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ability type */,
  "ability_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ability type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ability type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ability_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_synergies" (
  "character_synergy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the character synergy */,
  "character_id_a" INTEGER /* ID of the first character in the synergy */,
  "character_id_b" INTEGER /* ID of the second character in the synergy */,
  "synergy_effect" TEXT /* Effect of the synergy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_synergy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_synergies_character_id_b FOREIGN KEY ("character_id_b") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_synergies_character_id_a FOREIGN KEY ("character_id_a") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factions" (
  "faction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faction */,
  "faction_name" TEXT /* Name of the faction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the faction's role and characteristics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "popularity_history" (
  "popularity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the popularity record */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character this record pertains to */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the popularity was recorded */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score recorded on this date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("popularity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_popularity_history_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character the feedback is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, tester) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gameplay session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character used in the session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship */,
  "character_id_a" INTEGER /* ID of the first character in the relationship */,
  "character_id_b" INTEGER /* ID of the second character in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., synergy, counter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_relationships_character_id_b FOREIGN KEY ("character_id_b") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_relationships_character_id_a FOREIGN KEY ("character_id_a") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)
